items.title: Follow live: USWNT looks to bounce back in third friendly against Japan

items.title: Rockets list KD (knee) as questionable for Game 1
items.dek: Kevin Durant sustained a right knee contusion during practice this week, but the Rockets are optimistic it will not be a significant issue during their first-ro
items.body: Kevin Durant sustained a right knee contusion during practice this week, but the Rockets are optimistic it will not be a significant issue during their first-round playoff series against the Lakers, a source told ESPN.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'Friday' meets 'Thursday': Rams drop draft teaser inspired by Ice Cube's 1995 film
items.dek: The short film inspired by the 1995 comedy "Friday" stars the sons of Ice Cube and Chris Tucker, joined by Rams players and celebrity cameos.
items.body: The short film inspired by the 1995 comedy "Friday" stars the sons of Ice Cube and Chris Tucker, joined by Rams players and celebrity cameos.
items.author: IriLine Desk
